summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SLATE landing page. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI loads correctly with all sections present, but has issues with form feedback and external redirect.

ui_bugs.issue: Success/error message not displaying after form submission

integration_issues.issue: Form submits successfully to API but success message not shown to user
Redirect to https://app.slateup.ai fails with ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns correct response
POST /api/waitlist successfully stores emails in MongoDB
Landing page loads with hero section, SLATE title
Navbar contains all required elements (SLATE logo, navigation links)
All 6 sections present in DOM (hero, characters, how-it-works, features, waitlist, footer)
Characters section contains all 5 AI classmate cards with proper data-testids
How It Works section contains 3 step cards
Waitlist form elements are visible and functional
Waitlist count updates correctly after form submission (2→3 learners)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix waitlist form success message display and investigate external redirect URL (app.slateup.ai) - domain appears to be non-existent
